description: Mercantile accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th or early 12th century. Cursive and difficult to read. Several of the entries are circled. Verso is headed "Thursday, the 5th of Dhū l-Qaʿda." Names include Nissim, Yehuda, and Ibn Sughmār.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
